---
title: "IronClaw"
description: "NEAR AI's Rust-based agent on Bedrock via bedrockify."
---

<Note>
**Experimental pack.** IronClaw is NEAR AI's Rust-based agent. This pack runs it against Bedrock via bedrockify — Rust performance, Bedrock billing.
</Note>

## When to use

- Want a compiled Rust agent over a Node/Python one
- Want Bedrock billing through the standard IAM-role flow
- Interested in NEAR AI's agent primitives

## What the pack installs

- `bedrockify` dep on port 8090
- IronClaw binary (Rust, arm64)
- Env pointing `LLM_MODEL` at the configured model via bedrockify

## Install — non-interactive

```bash
curl -sfL install.lowkey.run | bash -s -- -y \
  --pack ironclaw \
  --profile builder
```

## Pack parameters

| Param | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `region` | `us-east-1` | AWS region for Bedrock |
| `model` | `anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6` | Model ID for `LLM_MODEL` (via bedrockify) |
| `bedrockify-port` | `8090` | Where bedrockify listens |

## Resource requirements

| | All profiles |
|---|---|
| Instance | `t4g.medium` |
| Root volume | 40 GB |
| Data volume | 0 GB |

## First-run

```bash
aws ssm start-session --target <instance-id>
ironclaw --version
ironclaw
```

## Tear-down

Delete the stack.
